final:
module top_module(
    input  A1_N,
    input  A2_N,
    input  B1  ,
    input  B2  ,
    output X
);// Implement the logic for the module
    assign X = (A1_N == 1) && (A2_N == 0) && (B1 == 1) && (B2 == 0);

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      assign X = (A1_N != 1) || (A2_N != 0) || (B1 != 1) || (B2 != 0);
    end
  end

endmodule
